title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Naukri.com

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Naukri.com
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
